ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "room_name" TEXT /* Name of the room */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature of the room */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity level of the room */,
  "light_exposure" REAL /* Amount of light the room receives */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tables" (
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each table */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the room where the table is located */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table */,
  "table_length" REAL /* Length of the table */,
  "table_width" REAL /* Width of the table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tables_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the room where the crop is located */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the table where the crop is located */,
  "gen" TEXT /* Generation of the crop */,
  "pheno" TEXT /* Phenotype of the crop */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the crop was monitored */,
  "square_across" INTEGER /* Square width across (up to 14) */,
  "square_width" INTEGER /* Square width (up to 6) */,
  "bud_width_rating" INTEGER /* BUD WIDTH RATING */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the crop */,
  "health_rating" INTEGER /* Subjective health rating of the crop */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the crop */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the crop entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the crop entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the crop entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the crop entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crops_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES tables ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crops_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_conditions" (
  "room_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room condition entry */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the rooms table */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature reading */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity reading */,
  "light_exposure" REAL /* Light exposure reading */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the reading was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_conditions_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id")
)
